---
title: "05_models_svm_ann"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# PURPOSE: Estimate SVM and ANN models across all three horizons
# ASSIGNED TO: Person 4 (Interpretation Lead)
# DEPENDS ON: 02_feature_engineering.R output in data/processed/

# REQUIREMENTS:
# SVM: Features MUST be standardized before fitting. Scaling fit on training set only. Use kernlab engine.
# ANN: Use nnet package. Architecture: one hidden layer, ReLU activation, dropout.
# Both: Output RMSE, MAE, R-squared, Directional Accuracy per horizon.

```{r main}
library(tidymodels)
library(kernlab)
library(nnet)
library(tidyverse)

message("05_models_svm_ann.R: Not yet implemented.")
```
